name: Fran's Bbq\potato\cheese Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the baked beans.
2. Mix together all ingredients except potatoes and cheese.
3. Adjust consistency with additional liquid or bread as needed.
4. Press mixture into the bottom and around sides of two 9x5-inch loaf pans, leaving a large center trough.
5. Reserve about 1-1/2 cups of the mixture to cover the top.
6. Fill each meatloaf's troughs with mashed potatoes.
7. Top the potatoes with cubed or grated cheese.
8. Cover with the reserved meat mixture.
9. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees.
